description: A VS Code task list that scans workspace files for TODO-style task tags and opens matches from a tree view.
commands.refresh.title: Refresh Tasks
commands.goToTask.title: Go to Task
commands.groupByFile.title: Group by File
commands.groupByTag.title: Group by Tag
commands.showFlatView.title: Show Flat View
commands.filterTree.title: Filter Tree
commands.clearTreeFilter.title: Clear Tree Filter
commands.expandTree.title: Expand Tree
commands.collapseTree.title: Collapse Tree
views.tasks.name: Tasks
configuration.title: hav Task List
configuration.rules.description: Rules for finding workspace tasks. The pattern and filePattern values are JavaScript regular expressions.
configuration.rules.color.description: VS Code theme color ID used for the task icon and editor tag highlight, such as charts.blue or charts.red.
configuration.excludeGlobs.description: Workspace glob patterns to skip while scanning.
configuration.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum file size to scan, in kilobytes.
configuration.showDiagnostics.descriptio: Show found tasks in the Problems view.
configuration.showEditorHighlights.descr: Highlight task tags in visible text editors using each rule color.
configuration.groupBy.description: How the task tree displays found tasks. File grouping shows folders and files, tag grouping groups by marker, and flat view shows tasks directly.
configuration.groupBy.file: Group tasks by folder and file.
configuration.groupBy.flat: Show tasks as a flat list.
configuration.autoScan.description: Automatically rescan when workspace files or settings change.
configuration.debounceMs.description: Delay before automatic rescans, in milliseconds.
